settings.title: Hub. Alternative. Open.
settings.description:
In response to the diverse and complex demands of sim racers—spanning different games, scenarios, and vehicle/track combinations—and the pursuit of high-quality, multifunctional steering wheels, CONSPIT has developed the H.AO HUB. 

*This open-wheel hub breaks the traditional limitations of single-use steering wheels, introducing innovative new features to tackle any challenge without fear.

settings.title: Race-Proven Full Carbon Fiber Structure
settings.description: The H.AO HUB boasts a genuine full carbon fiber housing, molded using a carbon fiber compression process for optimal rigidity, durability, and lightweight performance—replicating the high-quality standards of real race car components.

settings.title: Form Follows Function
settings.description: The H.AO HUB features a functional design with a clean frontal layout, defined by multi-line frames. The outer guards around the buttons and screen enhance visual depth while clearly indicating button functions. The seamlessly integrated paddles preserve a sleek look, balancing both aesthetics and performance.

settings.title: Swift-Triggers™
settings.description: The H.AO HUB features Swift-Triggers™, dual-action push-pull levers at the rear. These levers provide swift control and can function as independent buttons, pushing the limits of control and enhancing the overall interaction possibilities.

settings.title: Magnetic Pogo Control Module
settings.description: The H.AO HUB is equipped with an integrated 7-way switch and toggle switch control module, designed for seamless compatibility with CONSPIT's CX, DX, and RX series rims. Its magnetic pogo system allows for easy detachment, enabling broader compatibility with third-party rims.

settings.title: Asymmetric Dual-Clutch Paddles
settings.description:
Designed for competitive use, the asymmetric paddles offer quick release with the primary paddle and precise clutch control with the secondary. Swappable for personalized preference.

With CONSPIT Link 2.0, enjoy customizable dual-clutch settings, bite point adjustment, and independent axle modes for smooth race starts.

settings.title: Dual-Mode Rotary Switch
settings.description: Will allow users to switch between rotary switch / encoder modes.

settings.title: 2.99-Inch Built-in Display
settings.description: The 2.99-inch screen provides comprehensive data and allows quick style switching. Compact yet powerful, it enhances your racing experience with key information at a single glance.

settings.title: Multiple Choices, Diverse Styles
settings.description: Choose from 3 distinct wheel rim designs—RX, CX, and DX—and seamlessly switch between a variety of styles, including rally, drifting, casual, and competitive driving.

settings.title: Quick-Con Adapter with Independent USB Connection
settings.description:
- Standard 70mm PCD adapter, ensuring broad compatibility with various options.

- Heavy-duty quick connector ensures stable, reliable connections.

- Comes with a detachable coiled cable featuring a direct USB connection.

settings.title: CDP Quick Release (Optional)
settings.description:
The H.AO is optionally compatible with the CDP quick release system for direct connection to CONSPIT ARES wheelbase. 

It features a Formula-inspired CNC-machined 7075 aluminum clasp and ball locking design, with the clasp handling torque transmission and the balls ensuring precise longitudinal positioning. Spring contacts provide EMI-resistant electrical stability, outperforming wireless systems. Optimized contact geometry reduces ball wear, ensuring zero-play durability under extreme loads.
